objective: OpenCodex dev-branch hardening loop (HOTL): Track A SSE stability hardening in relay/responses pipeline with new devlog unit devlog/_plan/260724_sse_hardening/ (docs-first roadmap cycle, then one PABCD cycle per decade doc). Track B one-PR-at-a-time triage of open dev-target PRs with Sol reviewer subagents, explicit MERGE_AS_IS/MERGE_AND_IMPROVE/REBUILD_ON_DEV/DEFER/CLOSE decisions, executed via gh (user pre-approved remote merges; never touch main/preview; never merge gui-touching PRs without fresh approval; no publish/release; no force-push). Verification: bun run typecheck + focused tests per D, full suite before dev push, CI green before merge. Terminal outcomes DONE/BLOCKED/NEEDS_HUMAN/BUDGET_EXHAUSTED as stated in host goal.
